description_long: This is a simple wooden fence composed of two horizontal rails and two vertical posts. The rails are slightly irregular, giving the fence a rustic, hand-crafted appearance. The wood is painted in two tones: the rails are a medium reddish-brown, while the posts are a darker brown. There are no visible decorative elements, caps, or embellishments on the posts or rails. The construction appears lightweight and is likely intended as a visual or symbolic barrier rather than a heavy-duty security fence. The surface finish is matte, and the wood grain is subtly visible, suggesting a natural, unfinished texture.
description: A rustic, two-rail wooden fence with dark posts and reddish-brown rails, featuring a simple, hand-crafted look.
description_view_0: Front view showing both horizontal rails and the two vertical posts, with the irregular, wavy shape of the rails clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the fence, with both rails and posts aligned closely and little depth.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the rails and posts from the opposite side, with the same irregular rail shapes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and the slight offset between the rails and posts.
